name: Claude 2.1
note: Industry-first 200K context window, ~2x fewer hallucinations than Claude 2.0, plus beta tool use and system prompts.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via anthropic.com/news/claude-2-1 (release date, 200K context, tool-use beta, system prompts, ~2x hallucination reduction all verified verbatim). Pricing $8/$24 per MTok confirmed against Anthropic's official pricing PDF. Needle-in-haystack 94.5% independently verified by reading the actual Model_Card_Claude_3_Addendum.pdf Table 5 (Claude 2.1 column, 'All context lengths' row = 94.5%). apiAvailable=false confirmed: claude-2.1 was retired from the Claude API on July 21, 2025 per platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/model-deprecations. No changes made.
